summary: Read-only plan: #91222 is the best remaining live canonical for the narrow Google Vertex retry/stale ADC recovery work. #61443 is already closed existing-overlap context for broader configurable provider retry work and should not receive a closure action.

actions.reason: Already closed refs must not receive close actions; #61443 is existing-overlap context, not an actionable live candidate in this cluster.

#91222 should remain open as the live canonical for the narrow Google Vertex retry/stale ADC recovery subcluster; it is related to the broader closed provider-retry work but has a distinct provider-specific scope and remaining proof blocker.
